Q1FY27 preview: Brokerages expect strong revenue growth (30-33% YoY) and healthy PAT growth (25-31% YoY) driven by volume growth, favorable exports, and improved product mix.
Reported strong Q1FY27 results with a three-fold jump in standalone net profit (₹5,253 crore vs ₹1,675 crore YoY); gross NPAs declined to 2.78%; operating profit rose; stock gained 6%.
Motilal Oswal Financial Services reiterated 'Buy' rating post strong Q1 results, citing earnings beat, controlled provisions, strong asset quality, and improved margins.
Nirmal Bang reiterated 'Hold' rating post strong Q1 results, citing PAT ahead of estimates, improved asset quality, and strong provision coverage ratio.
Q1 earnings reported (5% rise in net profit, 6.7% growth in net interest income, stable asset quality) but shares declined over 4% in early trade.
Brokerages retained 'Buy' ratings despite share price fall, highlighting strong balance sheet and growth prospects.
Fell 5.30% as part of a general banking stock sell-off and broader market crash due to US-Iran war jitters.
